comment:
Tab definitions for the built-in financial website browser.
Copy this file next to the application executable to override these defaults.
URL placeholders: {upper} = symbol in UPPER CASE (e.g. IBM), {lower} = lower case (e.g. ibm).

tabs.name: Morningstar
tabs.comment:
Search Morningstar for quotes, ratings, and analyst research.
(A direct quote URL requires the exchange code, so search is used instead.)

tabs.name: TradingView
tabs.comment:
Interactive TradingView chart.
The exchange is resolved automatically from the ticker symbol.

tabs.name: Zacks
tabs.comment: Stock analysis, earnings estimates, and ratings on Zacks.com.

tabs.name: NYSE Hours
tabs.comment:
Official NYSE market hours and holiday calendar.
URL is not symbol-specific — the {upper} placeholder is unused.
